architecturalFeatures.en: Small Southern Fujian temple architecture integrated into the alleyway space; building scale close to residential dwellings, reflecting the unpretentious character of Tainan's folk religion.
architecturalFeatures.zh: 小型閩南廟宇建築，融入巷弄空間，建築尺度貼近民居，反映台南庶民信仰的樸實面貌。

en: Note: Early fishing-community temple preserved within alleyways
zh: 特色：保存於巷弄中的早期漁業信仰廟宇

historicalContext.en: Origins traced to the Zheng Kingdom era; once central to fishermen near Anping Harbor, witnessing the historical process of early Han immigrant settlement along Taiwan's coast.
historicalContext.zh: 創建年代可追溯明鄭時期，曾為安平港一帶漁民信仰核心，見證早期漢人移民在台灣沿海建立聚落的歷史過程。

modernUse.en: Still functioning as a community temple, maintained voluntarily by local residents — a genuine microcosm of Tainan's community faith life.
modernUse.zh: 現仍維持社區廟宇功能，由在地居民自發維護，是台南社區信仰生活的真實縮影。

description.en: Alleyway framing: Shoot the temple facade from the alley entrance, using the walls on both sides as a natural frame to highlight how the temple integrates into everyday space.
description.zh: 巷弄視角：站在巷弄入口處拍攝廟宇正面，以巷弄兩側牆壁為框，突顯廟宇融入日常空間的特色。

description.en: Temple meets residence: Shoot the temple and the adjacent house side by side, showing the spatial coexistence of faith and daily life.
description.zh: 廟宇與民居對比：拍攝廟宇與緊鄰民居並列的場景，呈現信仰與生活共存的空間關係。

description.en: Incense burner details: Close-up of the incense burner and ash residue outside the temple; note the marks of time and daily use.
description.zh: 香爐與日常細節：近距離拍攝廟前香爐、金紙灰燼等細節，注意歲月痕跡與使用感。

whyItMatters.en: A neighborhood sea-deity temple; small in scale but an important window into the faith life of Tainan's early fishing communities. Such small temples have largely disappeared with Taiwan's urbanization, making its survival especially precious.
whyItMatters.zh: 地方性海神廟，規模雖小卻是理解台南早期漁業社群信仰生活的重要窗口。此類小型廟宇在台灣都市化過程中大量消失，能保存至今尤為珍貴。
